summary: Task 036 appears complete in substance. The public homepage now suppresses non-http/https published links before rendering, published link cards keep the saved external URL as the public target with `_blank` plus `rel="noopener noreferrer"`, and the public UI adds an explicit new-tab affordance. E2E coverage now verifies an actual popup to the saved URL and confirms an unsafe published URL stays off `/`. The provided deterministic run shows `npm run verify` passing.
satisfied_exit_criteria: Published public links open the saved external destination in a new tab from the homepage link card.
Public link behavior remains aligned with the existing safe-URL contract by filtering public links to `http`/`https` only.
The required gate `npm run verify` passed in the provided deterministic check run.
